citations.quote: Rent: £4,686.18 Total Rent (including £500 Advance Rent Payment) £28.23 Per Day
The subsequent monthly sums due will be shown on the rent schedule to be provided separately to the Tenant.
The Landlord acknowledges the Tenant has paid the Advance Payment of FIVE HUNDRED POUNDS (£500) STERLING which will be credited to the Tenant's rent account.
If the Tenant's Rent instalments account falls into arrears, the Landlord will be entitled to seek payment from the Tenant's guarantor
Where a Rent account is in arrears by two monthly instalments, the Landlord will be entitled to issue a notice to quit
If you accept the Tenancy Agreement but don't move into the Accommodation, you remain financially liable for the Accommodation fees for the full period

findings.text: Total rent under the tenancy is £4,686.18, including a £500 advance payment, at £28.23 per day.
The rent schedule showing monthly instalments is described as provided separately and is not included in this source.
The tenant paid a £500 advance payment credited to the rent account.
Arrears trigger guarantor liability and potential notice to quit after two missed instalments; liability persists even if tenant does not move in.

proposed_artifacts.content:
## Source Search Result: Rent Schedule and Payment Records

**Source Reviewed:** NAP-SRC-0010 (MISS ANFAL ELBUSHRA Student Licence)

**Findings:**
- The tenancy agreement states total rent of £4,686.18, a £500 advance payment, and monthly instalments by recurring card payments.
- The rent schedule showing monthly amounts and due dates is explicitly described as "provided separately" and is **not included** in this source.
- No payment records, receipts, arrears statements, or guarantor details were found in this source.

**Next Steps:**
- Search other matter sources (e.g., correspondence, accommodation office records, financial records) for the separate rent schedule and any payment or arrears records.
- If the rent schedule is located, reconcile instalment amounts and due dates against any claimed arrears.
proposed_artifacts.title: Rent Schedule and Payment Records Search Result

proposed_tasks.instructions: Search all remaining matter sources (e.g., correspondence, accommodation office records, financial records, guarantor documents) for the rent schedule referenced in NAP-SRC-0010 Clause 2(a), as well as any payment records, receipts, arrears statements, or guarantor details. Report any found documents with relevant excerpts.
proposed_tasks.title: Locate rent schedule and payment records in other matter sources

risk_flags.text: Absence of the rent schedule may hinder accurate calculation of arrears and enforcement of notice to quit or guarantor claims.
Tenant may be liable for full rent even if never in occupation, increasing potential arrears exposure.
Without the rent schedule, it is unclear whether the 2% discount for early full payment (Clause 2(c)) applies or was forfeited.

summary: Reviewed source NAP-SRC-0010 (Student Licence) for rent schedule and payment records. The tenancy agreement states rent of £4,686.18 total, a £500 advance payment, and monthly instalments by recurring card payments, but the rent schedule is described as provided separately and is not present in this source. No payment records, receipts, or arrears statements were found. A follow-up task is proposed to search for the separate rent schedule and payment records in other matter sources.

uncertainties.text: The actual rent schedule with monthly instalment amounts and due dates is not present in source NAP-SRC-0010.
No payment records, receipts, or arrears statements were found in this source.
The identity and contact details of the tenant's guarantor are not provided in this source.
